content.speakerText: I’m so sorry—I’ve gotta cancel tonight. My dog’s sick.
content.speakerTextCn: 太抱歉了，今晚得取消，我狗生病了。

options.text: No problem, let’s just skip it forever.
Oh no! Hope Fido’s okay—let’s reschedule?
Why do you always cancel? I’m tired of this.
That’s fine, I’ll find someone else to hang out with.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的歉意并表达了关心，同时提出改期，符合社交礼貌。选项1过于冷漠，选项3指责对方，选项4带有敌意，都不符合友好沟通原则。

content.speakerText: I’ll make it up to you—how about dinner this weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 我一定补偿你，这周末一起吃饭？

options.text: I don’t care anymore—just cancel again next time.
Yes! Italian? I’ve been craving pasta!
Maybe next year? I’m busy forever.
Sure, but only if you pay for everything.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极接受补偿提议，并加入具体建议（意大利菜），体现真诚和热情。选项1充满负面情绪，选项3拒绝得过于敷衍，选项4带有索取性质，不符合友好社交语境。

content.speakerText: I’m really sorry, but I have to cancel our coffee plan. My boss called an emergency meeting.
content.speakerTextCn: 真的很抱歉，我得取消我们的咖啡计划，老板召开了紧急会议。

options.text: Whatever, I’ll just drink coffee alone.
That’s totally understandable—how about we try Wednesday instead?
Why do you always have emergencies? Sounds fake.
Okay, but you owe me a latte next week.

content.explanation: 正确答案表现出理解并主动提议改期，是得体的回应。选项1冷漠，选项3质疑对方诚信，选项4虽有补偿但语气像交易，缺乏情感温度。

content.template: I’m so sorry—I’ve gotta cancel tonight. My dog’s sick. Oh no! Hope ___’s okay—let’s reschedule?
content.hint: 这是对话中提到的狗的名字，常用作宠物昵称
content.knowledgePoint: 专有名词在口语中的自然使用（宠物名）

content.template: I’ll make it up to you—how about dinner this weekend? Yes! ___? I’ve been craving pasta!
content.hint: 这是提出具体补偿方案时常用的菜系表达
content.knowledgePoint: 具体提议中的文化/饮食词汇搭配

content.template: I’m really sorry to cancel—___ work tomorrow? I’ll buy you lunch!
content.hint: 提出替代方案时的常用表达，语气友好且自然
content.knowledgePoint: 提议改期的核心句型（How about...?）

content.speakerText: I’m so sorry—I’ve gotta cancel tonight. My dog’s sick.
content.speakerTextCn: 太抱歉了，今晚得取消，我狗生病了。
expectedAnswers: Oh no! Hope your dog feels better soon. Can we plan for next week?
That’s too bad—I hope Fido’s okay. Let’s reschedule when you’re free!
No worries, health comes first. Text me when you’re up for it.
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达了理解和关心（如 hope...okay / feels better）
是否提出改期或开放性安排（如 reschedule / next week / text me）
是否避免指责或冷漠语气（如 not saying 'again?' or 'whatever'）

content.speakerText: I’ll make it up to you—how about dinner this weekend?
content.speakerTextCn: 我一定补偿你，这周末一起吃饭？
expectedAnswers: That sounds great! Maybe Italian? I’ve been missing pasta!
Yes, but let’s pick a day that works for both of us—no last-minute changes!
Definitely! I’m free Saturday night. How about that new place downtown?
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确接受补偿提议（如 yes / definitely / sounds great）
是否加入具体细节提升诚意（如菜系、日期、地点）
是否适当表达期望（如避免抱怨，但可温和提醒）

content.speakerText: I hate to cancel, but my flight got delayed and I won’t make it to the party.
content.speakerTextCn: 真不想取消，但我的航班延误了，赶不上派对了。
expectedAnswers: Oh no, that’s so frustrating! Safe travels—let’s catch up soon!
No problem—flights are unpredictable. Maybe we can do brunch next week?
That’s a bummer, but I totally get it. Let me know when you’re back in town!
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达同理心（如 frustrating / bummer / get it）
是否提供替代方案或开放性结尾（如 catch up / brunch next week）
是否使用自然口语表达（避免机械或书面语）
